description: Taking traditional designs and giving them a modern twist is what makes fastrack watches irreplaceable timepieces. This watch refuses to conform, with its stylish dial and minimalist design, backed up by a steel case for optimal performance. Wear this with trendy, casual ensembles - colour-pop tees, denims and sports shoesCase diameter: 45 mmCase thickness: 8 mmDial shape: SquareSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortRubber strap with tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack and red dial with branding at the 6 hour mark and brand logo at the 12 hour markQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering
